# Minimal subset of Incus metrics used by sandbox monitor unit tests.

incus_cpu_seconds_total{cpu="0",mode="system",name="sb1",project="default",type="container"} 2
incus_cpu_seconds_total{cpu="0",mode="user",name="sb1",project="default",type="container"} 4
incus_cpu_seconds_total{cpu="0",mode="system",name="sb2",project="default",type="container"} 0.75

incus_memory_Active_bytes{name="sb1",project="default",type="container"} 150
incus_memory_Inactive_bytes{name="sb1",project="default",type="container"} 250

incus_network_receive_bytes_total{device="eth0",name="sb1",project="default",type="container"} 1600
incus_network_transmit_bytes_total{device="eth0",name="sb1",project="default",type="container"} 2600
